name: zig-dom
description: Bun-only Zig-backed DOM implementation with happy-dom-compatible surface

scripts.build: bun run build:native && bun run build:js
scripts.verify:ffi: bun run build:native && ZIG_DOM_SKIP_TESTING_LIBRARY=1 bun test tests/unit/ffi.test.ts
scripts.verify:dom: bun run build && ZIG_DOM_SKIP_TESTING_LIBRARY=1 bun test tests/unit tests/integration/dom
scripts.verify:react: bun run build && bun run scripts/smoke-bun-react.ts
scripts.verify:fast: bun run verify:ffi && bun run verify:dom && bun run verify:react
scripts.benchmark:dom: bun run build && bun run scripts/benchmark-dom.ts
scripts.test: bun run build && bun test tests/unit tests/integration/dom tests/integration/react
scripts.test:wpt:expanded: bun run verify:wpt:selectors && bun run verify:wpt:events && bun run verify:wpt:parser && bun run verify:wpt:forms && bun run verify:wpt:custom-elements-shadow
scripts.test:react: bun run build && bun test tests/integration/react
